ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "ident" TEXT /* Identifier code for the facility */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., heliport, small_airport, closed) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the facility (latitude, longitude) */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the facility in feet */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the facility is located */,
  "iso_country" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "iso_region" TEXT /* ISO region code */,
  "municipality" TEXT /* Municipality or city where the facility is located */,
  "gps_code" TEXT /* GPS code for the facility */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the facility */,
  "local_code" TEXT /* Local code for the facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the facility (e.g., open, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was last updated */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., private, public, government) */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the facility */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES facility_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type (e.g., heliport, small_airport, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., open, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the log pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, create, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the coordinate pertains to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_coordinates_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the contact pertains to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_contacts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, operator, public) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the note pertains to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_notes_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
